## Summary
<!-- 1-3 sentences. Why are we making this change? -->

## Change type
- [ ] feat — new check, primitive, or capability
- [ ] fix — bug or correctness fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — internal restructuring, no behavior change
- [ ] chore — tooling, CI, dependencies

## Catalog impact
- [ ] No catalog changes
- [ ] New checks added (list IDs):
- [ ] Existing checks modified (list IDs):
- [ ] Severity changes (list IDs and old → new):

## Test plan
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] If catalog changed: `make e2e` exercised on relevant container OS
- [ ] If new primitive: positive + negative table tests added
- [ ] Updated `docs/runbook-mapping.md` if a runbook prereq is now covered

## References
<!-- Linked Posit doc URLs, internal Slack threads, customer tickets. -->
